-- 3 of 12 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 1: The Structure of Copy
Writing great copy starts with a great foundation -- a solid structure you can build on.
Here’s where you’ll discover…
• A simple, easy secret for getting better at writing that almost no one teaches.
• How to unlock what you already know about writing A-list copy.
• The mistake most copywriters make at the very beginning of their copy, and how to
avoid it.
• What most marketers get wrong about the prospect -- a deadly mistake that instantly
kills response and sales.
• Picture this and you’ll keep prospects riveted.
• An easy way to make your product the most important thing in your prospect’s life.
• Hollywood tactics that boost interest and recall through the roof.
• How to convince your prospect your solution is their idea.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 1: The Structure of Copy
Exercises
1. Write a simple outline for your sales letter using the AIDA formula.
2. Write a list of the desires you need to promise to fulfill in your copy.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
A
I
D
A

2.
3.
4.
5.
6.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 12 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
3. Write a paragraph (don’t worry about writing “copy” yet) using the star, story, solution
formula.
4. Write a paragraph describing the problem, pain, and solution the product addresses.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 12 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
5. List all the objections you can think of to purchasing the product, and respond with the
counter-arguments to each.
Objection Counter Argument
